message:
test: auto-approve permissions with --permission-mode dontAsk

Headless tests need automatic permission approval to write files.
Using dontAsk mode to auto-approve permissions for test directory.

files.patch:
@@ -149,7 +149,7 @@ Begin now. Execute the plan."
 
 echo "Running Claude (output will be shown below and saved to $OUTPUT_FILE)..."
 echo "================================================================================"
-cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && timeout 1800 claude -p "$PROMPT" --allowed-tools=all --add-dir "$TEST_PROJECT" 2>&1 | tee "$OUTPUT_FILE" || {
+cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && timeout 1800 claude -p "$PROMPT" --allowed-tools=all --add-dir "$TEST_PROJECT" --permission-mode dontAsk 2>&1 | tee "$OUTPUT_FILE" || {
     echo ""
     echo "================================================================================"
     echo "EXECUTION FAILED (exit code: $?)"
